name: Dessert Pizza Blanca Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Mix until well blended.
Variation:
Add 1/4 teaspoon almond extract to the sauce while mixing for a nutty flavor that pairs nicely with apples and peaches.
Makes 1 cup; each serving contains less than 1/2 gram of fat.
